pilots.name: Pilot P1: Random Baseline Computation
pilots.description: Compute random baseline F1 for UAD on GPT-2 Small layer 8. Randomly select N pairs 100 times. Target: random F1 < 0.1, UAD F1 - random F1 > 0.3.
pilots.objective: Verify random baseline is low enough to make UAD F1 meaningful.
steps: Load GPT-2 Small and SAE (same as full E1)
Run UAD to get same-cluster pair count N
Randomly select N pairs from top 500 features 100 times
Compute mean F1, precision, recall across random selections
Compare UAD F1 vs random baseline F1
pilots.fail_action: If random F1 >= 0.3, UAD contribution is marginal. Consider pivot to backup candidates.

pilots.name: Pilot P2: Quick Ablation Test
pilots.description: Test 2 key ablations on a subset: (A1) no clustering, (A3) no dead feature filter. Compare F1 degradation. Target: each ablation shows F1 drop >= 0.05.
pilots.objective: Verify ablations are computationally cheap and show meaningful degradation.
steps: Run A1 (no clustering) on same features
Run A3 (no dead feature filter) on same features
pass_criteria: Each ablation shows F1 drop >= 0.05 from Full
pilots.fail_action: If ablations show no degradation, design choices may not matter. Still report as robustness.

pilots.name: Pilot P3: DFDA Parent-Positive Protocol
pilots.description: Test fixed DFDA evaluation on 2-3 absorbed pairs. Collect parent-positive examples, train MLP, evaluate parent-positive MSE improvement. Target: improvement > 10% on >=2/3 pairs.
pilots.objective: Verify parent-positive DFDA evaluation works and shows genuine improvement.
steps: For each pair, collect parent-positive examples
pilots.fail_action: If improvement < 5% on all pairs, DFDA metric is genuinely broken. Drop DFDA from paper.

pilot_decision_matrix.all_pass: Proceed with all full experiments (E1-E7). Full steam ahead.
pilot_decision_matrix.p1_p2_pass_only: UAD is solid but DFDA parent-positive fails. Proceed with UAD-only experiments (E1-E5, E7). Drop DFDA.
pilot_decision_matrix.p1_pass_only: Random baseline is low but ablations show no degradation. Proceed with UAD but de-emphasize design choices.
pilot_decision_matrix.p3_pass_only: DFDA works but random baseline is high. Re-evaluate UAD contribution; may need to pivot.
pilot_decision_matrix.none_pass: REFINE: Core methods fail. Consider pivot to backup candidates (B, C, D).

go_no_go_gates.condition: P1 (Random Baseline) random F1 < 0.1 AND UAD F1 - random F1 >= 0.3
go_no_go_gates.if_passed: UAD contribution is meaningful. Proceed to full experiments.
go_no_go_gates.if_failed: If random F1 >= 0.3, UAD contribution is marginal. Consider pivot.

go_no_go_gates.if_passed: DFDA is viable. Include in paper with parent-positive protocol.
go_no_go_gates.if_failed: If improvement < 5% on all pairs, drop DFDA from paper. Focus on UAD only.
